name: io.github.ataberk-xyz/gossipcat
description: Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code — consensus review, adaptive dispatch, skill learning

environmentVariables.description: Google Gemini API key for relay agents (optional — native agents need no API key)
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Fixed port for the relay/dashboard server (optional — defaults to OS-assigned with sticky file)
environmentVariables.name: GOSSIPCAT_PORT
